login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your credentials to access OpenFlow

errors.emailUsesGoogle: This account uses Google. Sign in with Google instead.
errors.oauthDuplicate: An account already exists for {email}. Sign in with your password, then connect Google from Account settings.

signup.title: Create account
signup.name: Full name
signup.checkEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link.

errors.emailExistsGoogle: An account already exists with this email via Google. Sign in with Google instead.
errors.emailExists: An account already exists with this email. Sign in instead.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a reset link
forgotPassword.checkEmail: Check your email for a password reset link.

errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.oauthFailed: OAuth sign-in failed. Please try again.

verifyPhone.title: Verify your phone

errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
errors.phoneTaken: This phone is already registered with another account.
errors.sendFailed: Couldn't send the code. Try again.
errors.otpLocked: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
errors.rateLimited24h: You've requested too many codes today. Try again in 24 hours.

copilot.title: Copilot
copilot.emptyState: Ask me anything about your agents.

toolbar.deleteAgentDescription: Permanently delete this app and all its data. This action cannot be undone.

agents.empty: No apps yet. Create your first one.
agents.name: Name

agents.slugTaken: An agent with this name already exists. Try a different name.
agents.selectAgentDescription: Choose an app from the sidebar to open its graph editor.
agents.createFirstDescription: Create your first app from scratch or start from a template.
agents.createError: Failed to create agent. Please try again.

editor.publishFailed: Failed to publish. Please try again.
editor.directLinkHint: Opens a fullscreen chat when visited directly.
editor.autoSaveFailed: Auto-save failed. Your changes may not be saved.
editor.exportValidationError: Graph has validation errors. Please fix before exporting.
editor.switchVersionDescription: You have unpublished changes that will be lost. Continue?
editor.restoreVersionFailed: Failed to restore version. Please try again.
editor.loadVersionsFailed: Failed to load versions. Please try again.
editor.seedGraphFailed: Failed to save initial graph. Please reload the page.
editor.deleteNodeDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the node and remove all its connections.
editor.deleteEdgeDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the edge.

channels.noTenantsDescription: Create tenants in the org settings to configure channels.

whatsappConnect.title: Connect WhatsApp Business
whatsappConnect.description: Link your WhatsApp Business number through Facebook Embedded Signup.

whatsappConnect.waitingFacebook: Complete the setup in the Facebook popup...
whatsappConnect.connectError: Failed to connect WhatsApp. Please try again.

simulation.title: Simulation
simulation.clearDescription: This will reset the conversation and all results.

agentEditor.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter the system prompt for this agent...
agentEditor.maxStepsDescription: Maximum number of tool-call loops. Defaults to 20 if empty.
agentEditor.emptyContextItems: No context items yet. Add one to provide additional context.
agentEditor.contextItemsDescription: Context items are additional instructions or data included in every LLM call. Use them for reference material, rules, or structured data.
agentEditor.deleteContextItemDescription: This context item will be permanently removed.
agentEditor.addSkillError: No skills found in this repository
agentEditor.addSkillInvalidUrl: Please select a repository or enter a valid GitHub URL
agentEditor.removeSkillDescription: This skill will be removed from the agent.
agentEditor.skillsDescription: Skills are reusable capabilities from GitHub repositories that extend what your agent can do.
agentEditor.removeSelectedDescription: The selected skills will be removed from the agent.

edgePanel.toolCallWarningDescription: The source node "{nodeId}" has text and/or description content that will be cleared. Tool call nodes do not use these fields.

connectionMenu.noNodesAvailable: No other nodes available to connect to.
connectionMenu.disabledStartNode: Start node only supports user connections
connectionMenu.userSaysPlaceholder: I want to book a flight
connectionMenu.branchA: Branch A — when the agent decides:
connectionMenu.branchB: Branch B — when the agent decides:
connectionMenu.branchBPlaceholder: The customer wants to return an item
connectionMenu.continueLoop: Continue loop — when the agent decides:
connectionMenu.continueLoopPlaceholder: There are more items to process
connectionMenu.exitLoop: Exit loop — when the agent decides:

startNodePanel.title: Start Node
startNodePanel.description: This is the entry point of the graph. It cannot be modified.

nodePanel.disabledByToolCall: Disabled — this node routes through a tool call edge.
nodePanel.outputSchemaDescription: Define the structured output format for this agent node.
nodePanel.outputSchemaEmpty: No fields defined. Add fields to define the output structure.
nodePanel.outputPromptPlaceholder: Tell the LLM what to extract...
nodePanel.outputPromptRequired: An extraction prompt is required when an output schema is set.
nodePanel.outputSchemaDisabledNextNodeIsUser: Disable 'next node is user' to set an output schema.
nodePanel.outputSchemaDisabledMultipleEdges: Output schemas require at most one outgoing edge.
nodePanel.outputSchemaDisabledPreconditions: Remove preconditions from outgoing edges to set an output schema.
nodePanel.outputSchemaDisabledContextPreconditions: Remove context preconditions from outgoing edges to set an output schema.

referenceDialog.title: Configure Reference
referenceDialog.noUpstreamNodes: No upstream nodes with output schemas found.
referenceDialog.pathCovered: All paths pass through this node.
referenceDialog.pathNotCovered: Some paths don't pass through this node. Add a fallback.
referenceDialog.optionalFieldInfo: This field is optional. The value may be null at runtime.
referenceDialog.requiredFallback: A fallback is required because the source field is optional and the target is required.

outputSchemas.deleteDescription: This will remove the schema "{name}" and unassign it from any nodes using it.

orgs.empty: No organizations yet. Create your first one.

welcome.title: Welcome to OpenFlow
welcome.description: Create your first organization to start building agents.

apiKeys.title: OpenRouter API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage OpenRouter API keys used by your agents to connect to LLM providers.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.nameFormat: Name must be uppercase letters and underscores only.
apiKeys.createError: Failed to add key. Please try again.
apiKeys.deleteDescription: This will delete "{name}". Agents using this key will need a new one selected.
apiKeys.deleteError: Failed to delete key. Please try again.
apiKeys.noKeys: No API keys configured. Add keys in org settings.
apiKeys.requiresStagingKey: Set a staging API key first
apiKeys.requiresProductionKey: Set a production API key first

mcpLibrary.allVariablesRequired: All variables must have values before discovering tools.
mcpLibrary.oauthExpired: Connection expired — click Discover Tools to reconnect
mcpLibrary.oauthRequired: This MCP requires sign-in. Click Discover Tools to connect.
mcpLibrary.oauthError: Failed to connect. Please try again.

envVariables.title: Environment Variables
envVariables.name: Name
envVariables.nameFormat: Name must be uppercase letters and underscores only.
envVariables.secretDescription: Secret values are masked after saving.
envVariables.deleteDescription: This will delete "{name}". MCP servers referencing this variable will need a new value.
envVariables.enterNewValue: Enter new value (leave empty to keep current)

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.description: Create and manage tenant environments for your deployed agents.
tenants.name: Name
tenants.emptyDescription: Tenants let you isolate sessions and executions per client or environment.
tenants.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and disassociate its sessions and executions. This cannot be undone.

webChannel.title: Web channel
webChannel.subtitle: Control where the OpenFlow chat widget can be embedded for this tenant.
webChannel.toggleHint: Turn off to block all web widget requests for this tenant.
webChannel.empty: No origins allowed yet. The widget will be blocked everywhere.
webChannel.duplicateEntry: This origin is already in the list.

toolTest.emptyState: Run a tool to see the result here.
toolTest.requiredFields: Fill in all required fields to run.

theme.appearanceDescription: Choose your preferred color theme for the interface.
theme.label: Theme

executionKeys.title: Execution API Keys
executionKeys.description: Create API keys to authenticate external callers invoking your published agents. Keys are shown only once at creation.
executionKeys.name: Key name
executionKeys.allAgentsDescription: Access all agents, including future ones.
executionKeys.allAgentsWarning: Anyone with this key can invoke any agent in your organization. Rotate regularly and use scoped keys for third-party integrations.
executionKeys.agentsDescription: Select which published agents this key can access.
executionKeys.expiresAtDescription: Optional. Leave empty for no expiration.
executionKeys.createError: Failed to create key. Please try again.
executionKeys.keyCreatedDescription: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again.
executionKeys.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}". Any external callers using this key will stop working.
executionKeys.deleteError: Failed to delete key. Please try again.
executionKeys.noKeys: No execution API keys yet. Create your first key to start using your agents via API.
executionKeys.noKeysDescription: Create an API key to authenticate external callers invoking your published agents.
executionKeys.updateError: Failed to update key. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard

debug.notVisited: Not visited — agent took a different path.
debug.selectNode: Select a node to inspect its details.
debug.previousExecDescription: This execution continued from where the previous one left off.

agentDebug.selectStep: Select a step to inspect its request and response.

dashboard.empty: No data yet. Run your first agent to see metrics here.
dashboard.noExecutions: No executions yet for this tenant.
dashboard.deleteSessionDescription: This will permanently delete this session and all its execution data. This action cannot be undone.

status.allPassed: All checks passed. The graph is ready.
status.mcpDisabled: "{name}" is disabled. Enable it or remove it before publishing.
status.mcpNoTools: "{name}" has no discovered tools. Run Discover Tools to connect it.

marketplace.blankCanvasDescription: Start from scratch with an empty graph
marketplace.typeWorkflowDescription: Build a graph of connected nodes with conditional routing. Ideal for strict, accurate routines.
marketplace.typeAgentDescription: Configure prompts, context, and tools with an execution loop. Ideal for autonomous decisions.

vfsConfig.enableVfsDescription: Allow this agent to read and write files in connected repositories
vfsConfig.removeConfigDescription: This will disconnect the repository from this agent for this tenant. The agent will no longer have file system access for this tenant.
vfsConfig.protectedPathsDescription: Glob patterns for paths the agent cannot write to (one per line)
vfsConfig.installationSuspended: GitHub installation is suspended. The owner must unsuspend it from GitHub settings.
vfsConfig.installationRevoked: GitHub installation was revoked. Click Reconnect to set up a new connection.
vfsConfig.repoRemoved: This repository is no longer accessible. Select a different repository.
vfsConfig.noTenants: No tenants found. Create a tenant to configure repository access.
vfsConfig.noTenantsDescription: Create a tenant to configure repository access for this agent.
vfsConfig.rateLimitThresholdHint: Warn when GitHub API calls remaining below this

settings.title: Settings
settings.privateDescription: Only your organization can access this agent.
settings.publicDescription: Anyone can create copies from your published graph.
settings.publicExplanation: If you choose to publish your agent to our marketplace, other users will be able to create copies of this agent's graph. They won't have access to your API keys, secrets, or execution data.
settings.makePublicDescription: Your agent's published graph will become visible to all users in the marketplace. No secrets or execution data will be shared.
settings.makePrivateDescription: Your agent will be removed from the marketplace. Users who already created copies will keep them.
settings.deleteAgentDescription: Once deleted, this app and all its data will be permanently removed.
settings.mustPublishFirst: Publish your agent at least once before making it public.

team.title: Team
team.description: Manage who has access to this organization.
team.inviteDescription: Add people by email. They'll get access immediately if they have an account, or when they sign up.
team.noMembersDescription: Invite teammates to collaborate on agents, share API keys, and manage this organization together.
team.inviteSuccess: {name} has been added to the team.
team.removeDescription: This will remove "{name}" from the organization. They will lose access immediately.
team.removeError: Failed to remove member. Please try again.
team.transferDescription: This will make "{name}" the new owner. You will be demoted to admin. This action cannot be undone.
team.transferError: Failed to transfer ownership. Please try again.
team.roleChangeError: Failed to change role. Please try again.
team.cancelInviteDescription: This will cancel the pending invitation for "{email}". They will no longer be able to join.
team.cancelInviteError: Failed to cancel invitation. Please try again.

whatsappTemplates.title: WhatsApp Templates
whatsappTemplates.subtitle: Messages that can be sent outside the 24-hour window once Meta approves them.
whatsappTemplates.emptyDescription: Create your first template and submit it for Meta approval.

create.pageSubtitle: Compose a message, then submit it to Meta for approval.
create.approvalNoteBody: Approval usually arrives within a few hours. Your template will show as "pending review" until Meta decides.
create.noConnectionsDescription: You need to connect a WhatsApp Business account to this tenant before creating templates.

fields.nameHint: A unique identifier for this template
fields.bodyHint: Use numeric placeholders like 1, 2, etc. for variables
fields.descriptionHint: Internal notes about what this template is used for
fields.connectionHint: The WhatsApp Business number this template will belong to
fields.variablesHint: Each placeholder in the body must have a matching variable defined here

variableBuilder.empty: No variables yet. Add one, or reference a numeric placeholder in the body.

delete.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete the template "{name}". This action cannot be undone.

validation.placeholderNotUsed: Placeholder {key} is used in the body but not defined in variables
validation.variableUnused: Variable "{key}" ({name}) is defined but not used in the body

errors.fieldsRequired: Name, body, and category are required
errors.invalidVariables: Variables must be a JSON array
